reviews.comment:
ATENCION VIAJEROS🚫🚫
Pedí un tason de café solo y en el tiket dice con leche, le reclame y me dice la cajera que esa es la forma de identificar el cobro, que la leche es gratis🤌 posterior a eso, cuando me termine el café le pedi que me sirva la leche GRATIS y me dijo que no podía hacer eso.

(Translated by Google)
ATTENTION TRAVELERS🚫🚫
I ordered a cup of black coffee and the receipt said "with milk." I complained and the cashier told me that's how they identify the charge, that the milk is free🤌 After that, when I finished my coffee, I asked her to give me the milk for FREE and she said she couldn't do that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2NGNqZ2FnEAE
